productDisplayName: Fila Men Carbon White Casual Shoes
description: Reinforcing the brand's style, passion and creativity that are deeply embedded in its genetic code, the fila Carbon shoe is a great buy for those who love a twist of sporty in their casual shoes.UpperSynthetic upper upper for lightweight comfort and absolute breathabilitySynthetic and leather overlays strategically placed for added shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded and meshed tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe box for abrasion free comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and absolute shock absorptionFabric footbed for sweat-free wearOutsoleTPR outsole with criss-crossing miniature waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and traction
